title: Tanacetopsis hedgei
taxonomy: Tanacetopsis hedgei belongs to the family Compositae, now known as Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This plant is part of the genus Tanacetopsis, which contains a small number of species found in the western parts of South Africa. The classification of Tanacetopsis hedgei reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and genus. Further classification within the plant kingdom places it in the kingdom Plantae, which is the broadest category for plants. This classification system is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics.
